name: Cherry Yogurt Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg white until it forms soft peaks.
2. Gradually add the cherry yogurt while continuing to beat the mixture.
3. Beat the frosting until it reaches stiff peaks.
4. Spread the frosting on an 8 x 9-inch cake.
5. Serve immediately.
Yield: Frosting for sides and tops of any size cake.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 serving NEGLIGIBLE; CAL: 1 serving NEGLIGIBLE
Source: The Diabetic Chocolate Cookbook by Mary Jane Finsand
